subject: Galarian Yamask, a crow-like black bird Pokemon holding a clay tablet with inscribed markings in its feet, standing amid a ruined or stony outdoor setting
description: A dark bird Pokemon resembling a crow or rook stands in an action pose, clutching a rectangular clay slab in its feet or claws. The tablet bears carved geometric inscriptions. The creature has a round dark body, a prominent eye, and a slight aggressive posture as if mid-charge. The background shows stone walls or rocky ruins in muted earth tones, with some vegetation visible. The mood is unsettling — a possessed artifact carried by a ghost-type creature.
foreground: Galarian Yamask holding clay tablet with inscriptions
background: stone ruins or rocky wall, earthy vegetation
